title: Irdai keeps FY27 cession rate at 4%, backs GIC Re role
summary: Irdai has maintained the mandatory 4% cession rate for FY27, directing general insurers to place this share with GIC Re. This decision aims to solidify GIC Re's position in India's reinsurance market, despite the entry of new domestic players like Jio-Allianz Re and Valueattics Re, who are poised to challenge its dominance.

title: Adani bags top spot in richest Asians’ club
summary: Gautam Adani has officially claimed the title of Asia's wealthiest individual, overtaking Mukesh Ambani with a net worth of $92.6 billion as of April 16. The surge in Adani Group stock prices has fueled this remarkable comeback after earlier hardships. Adani now proudly ranks 19th on the prestigious Bloomberg Billionaire Index, highlighting a significant turnaround in his financial standing.

title: HDFC Bank Q4 results preview: Net profit may rise 9%, NII seen up 6% YoY with stable margins; dividend in focus
summary: HDFC Bank Q4 results preview: Analysts expect HDFC Bank to report net profit growth in the range of 5-10% YoY, while its NII to grow in the range of 3-6% YoY

title: TCS shares update on Nashik office case: Says Nida Khan 'not an HR', forms oversight panel, calls in Deloitte
summary: TCS has clarified that Nida Khan is not an HR manager, constituted a Keki Mistry-led oversight panel and engaged Deloitte and Trilegal for its internal probe into the Nashik unit case, even as police search for an absconding accused in Thane.

title: DeepSeek in talks to raise $300 million at $10 billion valuation, Report says
summary: DeepSeek is in talks to raise at least $300 million at a $10 billion valuation, according to a report, as the Chinese AI startup that shook global markets faces mounting capital demands for its frontier models.

title: Are you dependent on just your salary? Here's how to create multiple income streams to boost your cash flow
summary: Multiple sources of income can include monthly interest, quarterly dividends, quarterly REIT, InvIT distributions, alternative investments, freelance projects, etc.
